case_title: CARMELA CHIURAZZI VS. VISA U.S.A.INC., et al

docket_entries.description: ANTITRUST/UNFAIR COMPETITION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIURAZZI, CARMELA ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED AND AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL ACTING FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC AS TO DEFENDANT VISA U.S.A.INC. VISA INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION MASTERCARD INTERNATIONAL INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2004 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
THIS CASE HAS BEEN COORDINATED INTO AND UNDER JCC4335 (CREDIT/DEBIT CARD TYING CASES)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-30-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JCC CASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIURAZZI, CARMELA ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED AND AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL ACTING FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISA U.S.A.INC. VISA INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION MASTERCARD INTERNATIONAL INC. SEE SCANNED DOC
